//: Auto-loaded when the plugin is enabled. It registers the Rutherford MCP server
//1: as a local stdio process launched with uvx, so no separate install step is needed:
//2: uv fetches rutherford-mcp-server from PyPI on first launch and caches it.
//3: Requires uv on PATH (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/). The setup-rutherford skill covers
//4: the fallback if uv is missing or you prefer an installed entry point.
